meaning: n.收回,撤退,退回,取消,退隐,停止服药,退股
examples: They announced the withdrawal of 12 000 troops from the area.
He replied that the UN had passed two major resolutions calling for a complete withdrawal.
There's no penalty for early withdrawal.
The Internal Revenue Service (IRS) will treat a delinquent loan as a cash withdrawal.
Douglas Carswell told MPs that talk of withdrawal was now a "mainstream" rather than a "maverick" view.
